purpose: Prepare better conversations with Nikita Kramar from public, cited context without impersonating him.
notFor: flattening a person into a profile

machineReadableFiles.use: Claims, confidence, intent modes, guardrails, and questions.

wwnkdBoundary: WWNKD means 'what would the public context suggest testing?' It must not answer in Nikita's voice.
guardrails: Do not claim to be Nikita.
Do not speak on his behalf.
Do not convert inference into biography.
When in doubt, ask and verify.
Use this to prepare, not perform closeness.
